summary: Tested 4 new changes for iteration 82: admin delete beneficiary cleanup, onboarding re-trigger fix, beneficiary drag-to-reorder, and admin users tree view redesign. Backend API tests passed (7/7, 1 skipped due to insufficient beneficiaries). Frontend UI verified visually - Admin Users tab shows correct labels (All Estates, Benefactors, Beneficiaries, Admins), Tree view shows estate-centric layout with benefactors at top and collapsible groups, Beneficiaries page has drag handles (GripVertical icons).

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) may trigger during automated testing - this is expected security behavior

critical_code_review_comments: BeneficiariesPage.js line 361: Correctly checks already_graduated before showing popup
onboarding.py: Returns already_graduated field and respects celebration_shown flag
beneficiaries.py: GET endpoint sorts by sort_order, PUT reorder endpoint persists order
admin.py DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id}: Lines 577-583 properly remove user from estates' beneficiaries arrays and delete beneficiary records
UsersTab.js: renderTreeView correctly shows estate-centric layout with benefactors sorted by age

success_rate.backend: 100% (7 passed, 1 skipped - need 2+ beneficiaries to test reorder)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (verified All Estates tab labels, tree view, drag handles)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 tests verified: 1) GET /api/onboarding/progress returns already_graduated field and dismissed stays true when celebration_shown is true; 2) GET /api/beneficiaries/{estate_id} returns sorted by sort_order; 3) PUT /api/beneficiaries/reorder/{estate_id} persists order (skipped due to single beneficiary); 4) Admin Users tab has correct labels and tree view with estate-centric layout; 5) BeneficiariesPage has drag handles (GripVertical icons); 6) DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} requires password confirmation and properly cleans up estate links.

verified_features.onboarding_already_graduated_field: WORKING - API returns already_graduated field matching celebration_shown value
verified_features.onboarding_dismissed_logic: WORKING - dismissed stays true when already_graduated is true
verified_features.beneficiary_sort_order: WORKING - GET returns beneficiaries sorted by sort_order field
verified_features.beneficiary_reorder_endpoint: EXISTS - PUT /api/beneficiaries/reorder/{estate_id} returns success=True (skipped full test)
verified_features.admin_tree_view: WORKING - Defaults to tree viewMode on All Estates tab, shows estate-centric layout
verified_features.admin_delete_requires_password: WORKING - Returns 401/422 without password, 401 with wrong password
verified_features.admin_linked_beneficiaries: WORKING - /api/admin/users returns linked_beneficiaries array for benefactors
verified_features.beneficiaries_drag_handles: WORKING - GripVertical icons visible on beneficiary cards with data-testid='drag-handle-{id}'
